results.name: 1. module loads without errors
2. public API surface is complete
3. constants match the sizing experiment
4. isLoaded() returns false before prewarm
5. score() raises error when not prewarmed
6. score() on empty text returns 0 (no tokens)
7. prewarm accepts injected session/tokenizer (test mode)
8. tokenize produces stable token IDs for known text
9. window extraction: short text → 1 short-circuit window
10. window extraction: text just above threshold → 2 windows
11. window extraction: text spanning multiple windows → MAX_WINDOWS
12. window dimensions are correct (SLIDING_WINDOW tokens each)
13. CLS at start, SEP at end, PAD padding correct
14. attention mask matches non-padded positions
15. max-pool aggregation picks highest P(attack)
16. classify() returns correct attack boolean at threshold=0.05
17. stats tracking: count, latency, sliding vs short-circuit
18. prewarm de-dupes concurrent calls
19. getConfig returns current settings
20. _reset clears state for next test
21. snapshot model produces benign score on benign prompt
22. snapshot model produces attack score on injection prompt
23. snapshot model with sliding window catches long-context attack
24. integration: end-to-end score on snapshot model
